<!--
Per CONTRIBUTING.md, backlog items are appended to TODO.md as a single
checklist line in the form `- [ ] <description of the change>`. Keep the
description small, focused, and self-contained enough that a single
automated run could implement it end to end without further clarification.
-->

## Proposed TODO.md line

```
- [ ] <description of the change>
```

## Why this change

<!-- What problem does this solve, or what value does it add? -->

## Notes

<!-- Any context, constraints, or pointers that would help an automated run implement this without further clarification. -->
